title: Johnny and Yosaku Cross Paths With the Crew
description: On pages 8–11, the Straw Hats settle into life aboard their new ship, raise their pirate flag, and meet Johnny and Yosaku on the way toward a cook.
scene: The crew’s mood is lighter after Syrup Village, but practical problems quickly appear: they need roles, supplies, medical help, and eventually a cook.

dialogue.speaker: Johnny
dialogue.text: I've killed countless of infamous Pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And yet a nameless person like you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't know who you're talking about but

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Z-ZORO!!? Is that really you, bro!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where's Yosaku? Isn't he usually with you?

summary: This part acts as a bridge from Syrup Village to Baratie, giving Usopp a place on the crew and steering the story toward Sanji’s introduction.
